nasb.text: Then Jared lived eight hundred years after he became the father of Enoch, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Jared lived after he fathered Enoch 800 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 雅列生以諾以後，還活了八百年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了八百年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 雅列生了以诺之后，又活了八百年，并且生了其他的儿女。
